# L10n FR Account Tax UNECE

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module will auto-configure the parameters *UNECE Tax Type* and
*UNECE Tax Category* on taxes defined in the *l10n_fr* module.
